branding.heroImageAlt: Example Softball players on the field

about.heading: Built Different
about.subtitle: A development-first select softball organization with a serious identity and clear structure.
body: Most select softball programs run through one person carrying everything — scheduling, dues, parent texts, lineups. That model burns coaches out.
We are built differently. Operations are owned by directors so coaches can own the field, and every player gets a real development plan.

pillars.title: Elite Coaching
pillars.text: Development-first, family-first coaching from experienced staff who let athletes grow.

pillars.title: Real Structure
pillars.text: Clear roles and accountability so the organization runs on plan, not on one phone.

pillars.title: Compete Big
pillars.text: USSSA, NSA, and NCS circuits with a schedule built to challenge and develop every player.

coaches.name: Coach Name
coaches.bio: Add a short coaching bio here — background, philosophy, and what families can expect.

roster.note: Roster shown in GameChanger format (first name + last initial + jersey). Individual profile pages activate per player once a signed parent media release is on file.

tryouts.heading: Tryouts & Recruiting
tryouts.details: Bring your glove, bat, helmet, cleats, and water. Arrive 15 minutes early to check in.

sponsors.heading: Our Sponsors
sponsors.subtitle: Community partners who help us compete and develop.
